abilities.name: Connected Consciousness
abilities.text: When declaring non-general actions, this model may draw range and LoS from an ally or model with Parasite token within 12" that was not used for this ability this turn.

abilities.name: Siphon Power
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may deal 1 damage to a friendly model within 4" to add a suit of its choice to the duel.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Hive Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Parasite token, this action has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Spin Web
triggers.text: Make a Web marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Will of Cadmus
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a model with a Parasite token or an ally. Target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model. The generated action ignores engagement.

actions.name: Citizens of Malifaux
actions.costs_and_restrictions: X is equal to the turn number. Choose up to X+1 Remains or Web markers within range. Summon an Eyes and Ears in base contact with the chosen markers, then remove those markers.

actions.name: Whispers in the Web
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Web marker. Make a Web marker in base contact with each enemy Scheme marker within (aura)3" of the target.

triggers.name: Crawler's Report
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (aura)3" of the target.
